title: MS 1514-2022 Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP)
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable quality workshop for applying MS 1514:2022 good manufacturing practices requirements at work.
whyThisMatters: MS 1514-2022 Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) helps quality, operations, and process teams translate MS 1514:2022 good manufacturing practices into daily routines, evidence, and improvement habits. The session covers To introduce GMP requirements, Management Responsibilities, and Understand the benefits of GMP, its implementation and coordination so participants can support standards, audits, and process discipline with more confidence.
builtFor: Supervisors and process owners involved in compliance work
Employees who support audits, records, or continual improvement
walkAwayWith: Understand the key requirements and workplace expectations behind the topic.
Recognize how process discipline, evidence, and records support compliance.
Apply practical improvement habits to daily operations.
Participate more confidently in implementation, review, or audit activities.

modules.title: Understand the benefits of GMP, its implementation and coordination

methodologyCaption: Participants connect standards and quality concepts to workplace examples through guided discussion, exercises, and practical review activities.
